$comment: Array-storage cluster (D-MIR-STORAGE-ARRAY-INDEX-GEP) + the latent pointer-index scale-1 miscompile fix, via Option A agnostic MIR element scaling (user §B 2026-06-17). Exercises (1) array-local brace-init `int a[4]={10,20,30,40}` (Stores at 0,4,8,12), (2) storage-array index `a[i]` with a RUNTIME index (fail-loud before — 3-op GEP unsupported at LIR; now a 2-op byte-offset GEP), and (3) `int*` pointer index `p[2]` (the silent miscompile: lea scale-1 read byte idx not idx*4). 40 + 30 - 20 - 8 = 42. RED-ON-DISABLE: without scaling, p[2] reads byte offset 2 (==0x00140000) not a[2]==30, collapsing the exit to 12. The optimizedPipelines arm keeps `i` a runtime value across the un-inlined pick() call (no const-fold of the index), so the element-scaling path runs in both arms.
